# Phase 1: Source Database Assessment

*This document is generated by the db-migration agent during Phase 1.*

## Status: Pending

Run `/db-migrate samples/wide-world-importers` to generate this assessment.

## Expected Contents

- Source schema inventory (tables, columns, types, FKs, indexes)
- Stored procedure / trigger / view definitions
- T-SQL incompatibility scan results (24 patterns)
- ora2pg complexity score (A/B/C)
- SSMS 22 performance baseline (execution plans)
- Security baseline (logins, permissions, encryption)
- Mermaid ER diagram
- SP dependency graph
